title: TaskTracker Configuration Interface
description: The 'TTConfig.java' file in the 'server/tasktracker' directory of Hadoop MapReduce architecture serves as a configuration interface for MapReduce tasks. It extends the MRConfig interface, providing specific constants for TaskTracker settings such as TT_MAP_SLOTS and TT_RESOURCE_CALCULATOR_PLUGIN. These constants, declared as static final String, are used by other components of the system to configure TaskTracker tasks. The file has no direct inputs or outputs, functioning purely as a configuration placeholder. Its dependencies include the MRConfig interface and classification annotations for audience and stability.
